meaning: 希勒尔(公元1世纪初的耶路撒冷犹太教圣经注释家)
examples: The school of Hillel forbade it.
After him, Abdon son of Hillel, from Pirathon, led Israel.
After him Abdon the son of Hillel the Pirathonite judged Israel.
Among those who pleaded not guilty was Hillel Nahmad, of the prominent Helly Nahmad art gallery.
Rather than respect the decision of the JSU, Hillel's professional "grown-ups" are urging them to reconsider.
